title: helichrysum leptorhizum
intro: Helichrysum leptorhizum, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant species native to the alpine regions of South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, derived from its essential oils and compounds such as 1,8-cineole and borneol. The health benefits of Helichrysum leptorhizum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate conditions such as arthritis, improve wound healing, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum leptorhizum include essential oils, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
